title: util-linux security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[2.40.2-15]
- libblkid: use snprintf() instead of sprintf()

[2.40.2-14]
- Fix setpwnam() buffer use [CVE-2025-14104]
full_text:
[2.40.2-15]
- libblkid: use snprintf() instead of sprintf()

[2.40.2-14]
- Fix setpwnam() buffer use [CVE-2025-14104]

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1696.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-14104.html
